name: High Altitude Aerodynamic Reconfiguration
description: You are a Field Operations Technician for a mining company. A heavy-lift survey hexacopter has just been deployed to the Los Pelambres copper mine in the Chilean Andes (elevation: 4,500m ASL). Due to the thin mountain air, the drone's motor and attitude control parameters must be reconfigured using the values specified in the engineering report located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/aerodynamic_report.txt. Update the MOT_THST_HOVER, MOT_HOVER_LEARN, MOT_SPIN_ARM, MOT_SPIN_MIN, ATC_THR_MIX_MAN, and MOT_YAW_HEADROOM parameters in QGroundControl to match the report's requirements.
